name: wallet-management-sample-webapp
description: Public sample demonstrating the Lumen Dev Wallet APIs from an organization's perspective. Vite + React + Tailwind frontend, Express thin-proxy backend.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
[OK] Setup complete. Next:
  1. Copy .env.example to .env
  2. Paste your Lumen API key and secret into .env
  3. Run: npm start
')"
